paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.47, representing a decrease of 1.75 percent from the prior close and 25.6 percent over the last 22 trading sessions. The company has seen one new news item in the last 24 hours.
Fermi Inc.'s recent news includes an announcement from PR Newswire regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. This news was released on July 23, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form filed on July 21, 2026, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there was one Form 4 filing in the feed.
